meaning: Lowest Common Multiple,[数]最小公倍数
examples: Laser capture microdissection(LCM) is a novel technique developed in recent years.
The menu operation interface is realized on LCM.
Illustrate the role of judgment in applying the LCM rule for inventory.
He warned that it would be premature to seek an LCM when discussions were ongoing.
Specifically, MSPs will be asked to carry a further Legislative Consent Motion (or LCM, formerly known as a Sewel motion).
